relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file represents a lending decision override approval from risk_and_compliance to credit; the outbound file represents loan disbursement instructions from credit to accounts. This forms a logical pipeline: an override approval triggers disbursement preparation. Both files share loan identifiers, customer/borrower concepts, loan amounts, currency, and loan terms. The outbound file's structure and content are plausibly derived from processing an approved override.

mappings.reasoning: System-generated unique identifier for the disbursement instruction; no source in inbound.
Inbound loanApplicationId becomes the loan_id in the outbound disbursement instruction.
Inbound contains customerId but not borrower name; name likely retrieved from customer master data in credit system.
Account number not present in inbound; likely sourced from customer account records in credit system.
Inbound loanAmount directly maps to outbound disbursement_amount.
Currency field name and ISO 4217 code format match exactly between inbound and outbound.
Inbound contains approvalDate but not a scheduled disbursement date; likely calculated or set by credit system workflow.
Disbursement method not specified in inbound; likely a default or system-determined value.
Destination account not present in inbound; sourced from borrower account records in credit system.
Bank identifier code not present in inbound; sourced from account routing information in credit system.
Loan purpose not captured in inbound override message; likely stored separately in loan agreement or product details.
Inbound loanTerm (in months) maps directly to outbound loan_term_months.
Interest rate not present in inbound override message; sourced from loan product or pricing details in credit system.
Inbound overrideDecision of 'APPROVED' maps to outbound status 'APPROVED'; represents approval state.
Credit officer who created the disbursement instruction not specified in inbound; determined by credit system workflow.
Inbound message timestamp could represent when the override was processed and disbursement instruction created.
Inbound approvedBy (risk and compliance executive) maps to outbound approved_by for the disbursement instruction.
Inbound approvalDate maps to outbound approved_date for the disbursement instruction.
Remarks could be populated from override reason, mitigating factors, and approval conditions as free-text notes.
